entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying

entries.source: how to understand a hard topic with AI
How to Understand a Hard Topic With AI
How to use AI for clear explanations, adaptive tutoring, Socratic questions, and better first steps.
entries.value: Indlela yokusebenzisa i-AI ukuze uthole izincazelo ezicacile, ukufundisa okuguquguqukayo, imibuzo ye-Socratic, nezinyathelo zokuqala ezingcono.

entries.source: I need to remember this for an exam.
I picked B. Why is C right?

entries.value: Ngicabanga ukuthi izinto ezisindayo ziwa ngokushesha

entries.source: I want history to feel alive but still evidence-aware.
entries.value: Ngifuna umlando uzwakale uphila kodwa usaqaphela ubufakazi.

entries.source: I watched a lesson but still do not get it.
I'll explain gravity
Ideas for a science project
identify a common mistake;
Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: Hlonza izikhala, buza imibuzo ecacisayo, wakhe kabusha incazelo, bese uzama futhi.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Hlonza izinhloso zesikole ezibaluleke kakhulu: ukwesekwa kwemiqondo, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, ukulungiselela izivivinyo, ukukhumbula okusebenzayo, impendulo yokubhala, noma ukwandisa ukufunda.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Uma ikhadi lihlala lihluleka, ungaliphindi kuphela. Buza ukuthi kungani linzima. Sebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction ukuthola ukungaqondi, i-Math Step Coach ngezikhala zenqubo, noma umtapo wemiyalo yokufunda nge-AI ukuthola umyalo wokutadisha ongcono.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Uma impendulo inguyebo, i-AI ikusizile ukutadisha. Uma impendulo ingucha, isinyathelo esilandelayo akusikho ukufunda okwengeziwe. Kuwukuzijwayeza okusebenzayo. Vula i-Learn Anything, i-Socratic Instruction, noma umtapo wemiyalo yokufunda nge-AI bese uguqula isihloko sibe umsebenzi okufanele uzame.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: Uma injongo yomfundi ingacacile, phakamisa abantu abangu-3 kuya ku-5 ngezizathu, izindlela ezingcono, izinga lengxabano, nekhwalithi yobufakazi. Uma umuntu eqanjwe kodwa isikhathi singekho, nikeza izinguqulo ezinomqondo zalowo muntu ngaphambi kwanoma iyiphi ingxoxo yomlingiswa. Uma umuntu nesikhathi sekucacile, yakha igumbi nedosiye ngaphambi kokuba umuntu akhulume.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: Uma injongo yomfundi ingacacile, yixazulule ibe izinketho zokufika ezingu-3 eziqondile bese ume ukuze akhethe. Uma iphasiphothi isivele icacile, vula umhlaba ngamakhadi ahlelekile esikhundleni sendima.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Uma impendulo izwakala ibanzi kakhulu, yinciphise. Cela isibonelo esisodwa, ukungaqondi okukodwa, umbuzo owodwa wokuhlola, noma isinyathelo esisodwa esilandelayo. Uma izwakala ilula kakhulu, cela inselele. Uma izwakala inzima kakhulu, cela ibhuloho elivela kulokho osuvele ukwazi.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Uma umsebenzi uwumsebenzi wasekhaya, qala ku-Homework Coach. Uma kuyi-math, sebenzisa i-Math Step Coach bese uyicela ihlole isinyathelo esisodwa ngesikhathi. Uma uzama ukuqonda umqondo ngokujulile, sebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction bese uphendula imibuzo ngaphambi kokucela isifinyezo.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: Uma uyisakhamuzi saseCalifornia, unelungelo lokwazi ukuthi iyiphi idatha esiyiqoqayo ngawe, ukucela ukususa idatha yakho, nokucela ukuthi singayithengisi noma singabelani ngayo. Ukuze usebenzise amalungelo akho okuvikela idatha, ungenza izicelo ezithile futhi usibuze:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: Uma ungumhlali we-European Union (EU) ne-European Economic Area (EEA), unamalungelo athile okuvikela idatha, avikelwe yi-GDPR. Sihlose ukuthatha izinyathelo ezifanele ukukuvumela ukuthi ulungise, uchibiyelwe, ususe, noma ukhawulele ukusetshenziswa kwe-Personal Data yakho. Uma ufuna ukwaziswa ukuthi iyiphi i-Personal Data esiyiphethe ngawe futhi uma ufuna isuswe ezinhlelweni zethu, sicela usithumele i-imeyili ku-support@inspir.app Uma ungumhlali we-European Union (EU) ne-European Economic Area (EEA), unamalungelo athile okuvikela idatha, avikelwe yi-GDPR. Sihlose ukuthatha izinyathelo ezifanele ukukuvumela ukuthi ulungise, uchibiyelwe, ususe, noma ukhawulele ukusetshenziswa kwe-Personal Data yakho. Ezimweni ezithile, unamalungelo alandelayo okuvikela idatha:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: Uma unemibuzo mayelana nale Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo, sicela uxhumane nathi nge-imeyili: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Uma unamathisela umbuzo womsebenzi wasekhaya bese ukopisha impendulo yokugcina, ungase uqede umsebenzi, kodwa awukakhi ikhono. Uma ucela iseluleko, uchaza ukucabanga kwakho, uqhathanisa impendulo yakho, futhi uzama inkinga efanayo, i-AI iba umlingani wokutadisha esikhundleni sendlela emfushane.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: Uma ufisa ukuthenga noma yimuphi umkhiqizo noma isevisi etholakala nge-Service (“Purchase”), ungacelwa ukunikeza ulwazi oluthile oluhambisana ne-Purchase yakho, kuhlanganise kodwa kungagcini enombolweni yekhadi lakho lesikweletu noma lesikweleti, usuku lokuphelelwa yisikhathi kwekhadi lakho, ikheli lakho lokukhokhisa, nolwazi lwakho lokuthumela. Umele futhi uqinisekisa ukuthi: (i) unelungelo elisemthethweni lokusebenzisa noma yimaphi amakhadi noma ezinye izindlela zokukhokha maqondana nanoma iyiphi i-Purchase; nokuthi (ii) ulwazi osinikeza lona luyiqiniso, lulungile futhi luphelele. Singase sisebenzise izinsizakalo zezinkampani zangaphandle ukuze kusizakale ukukhokha nokuqedelwa kwama-Purchases. Ngokuthumela ulwazi lwakho, usinikeza ilungelo lokunikeza lolu lwazi kulezi zinkampani zangaphandle ngaphansi kweNqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo. Sigcina ilungelo lokwenqaba noma ukukhansela i-oda lakho noma nini ngenxa yezizathu ezihlanganisa kodwa ezingagcini ekutholakaleni komkhiqizo noma isevisi, amaphutha encazelweni noma entengweni yomkhiqizo noma isevisi, iphutha e-odeni lakho noma ezinye izizathu. Sigcina ilungelo lokwenqaba noma ukukhansela i-oda lakho uma kusolwa ukukhwabanisa noma ukuthengiselana okungagunyaziwe noma okungekho emthethweni; isinqumo sizoba ngesethu futhi ngeke siphikiswe.

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: Emhlabeni lapho i-AI ithuthuka ngokushesha, kuzoba ukwazi nobuciko bomuntu kuphela okungasinda. U-Albert Einstein wake wathi, "Ubuciko buwukuhlakanipha kujabula."

entries.source: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation. For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: Nganoma iyiphi indlela ephula noma yimuphi umthetho noma umthethonqubo kazwelonke noma wamazwe omhlaba osebenzayo. Ngenhloso yokuxhaphaza, ukulimaza, noma ukuzama ukuxhaphaza noma ukulimaza izingane nganoma iyiphi indlela ngokuziveza kokuqukethwe okungafanele noma ngenye indlela. Ukudlulisa, noma ukwenza ukuthi kuthunyelwe, noma iyiphi impahla yokukhangisa noma yokukhuthaza, kuhlanganise nanoma iyiphi “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” noma olunye uhlobo olufanayo lokucela. Ukuzenza noma ukuzama ukuzenza i-Company, umsebenzi we-Company, omunye umsebenzisi, noma omunye umuntu noma inhlangano. Nganoma iyiphi indlela ephula amalungelo abanye, noma nganoma iyiphi indlela engekho emthethweni, esongelayo, ekhohlisayo, noma eyingozi, noma maqondana nanoma iyiphi injongo noma umsebenzi ongekho emthethweni, ongekho emthethweni, okhohlisayo, noma oyingozi. Ukwenza noma yikuphi okunye ukuziphatha okuvimba noma okunciphisa ukusebenzisa noma ukujabulela i-Service kwanoma ubani, noma okuthi, njengoba sinquma, kungalimaza noma kucasule i-Company noma abasebenzisi be-Service noma kubaveze esibophweni.

entries.source: In this guide
Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: Faka umbuzo, lokho osuvele ukuzamile, lapho ubambeke khona, nokuthi ufuna ithiphu, ukuhlolwa kwesinyathelo, noma impendulo.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Faka lokho okwaziyo, lokho okuzamile, izinga olidingayo, nohlobo losizo olufunayo.
